summary: EXP-197 rewrites WIN-038 to lead with the pole-floor impossibility from Section 2.1 (f_min = 8.78 Hz at r = 0, rises monotonically outward). Averaging result (14–42 Hz) demoted to reinforcement paragraph. Three patches to wins.json (id=038): finding, tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict (short field replacements), plus a ~405-word detail_evidence rewrite. detail_verdict_text and detail_extra left unchanged — the cycle-3 rewrite already fixed the post-hoc wording and the DOIs. Transverse-mode preemption is out of scope (handled by EXP-198, a separate pending defense-neutralization item).
